CustomField.formula: XTraining_Another_Related_Accred__c + XTraining_Fitting_Air_Ground_HP__c + XTraining_Fitting_Insulation__c + XTraining_Fitting_Other_Retrofit__c + XTraining_Fitting_Solar_PV_Thermal__c + XTraining_PAS_2035_Trustmark__c + XTraining_Retrofit_Assess_Design__c + XTraining_Retrofit_Proj_Mgmt__c
CustomField.label: Total number of Training Courses
